sections: P6 — Run the full implementation proof wall

repo_truth: The inherited live-smoke harness expects bare setup to create `.handbook`, but frozen HCM-1.4/HCM-2.1 authority makes setup non-authoring and HCM-2.1 requires the installed all-three smoke to pass. A clean installed run exits at happy-path authoring because setup returns 1/INDETERMINATE and leaves the root absent. The two-file repair authorizes only harness-owned creation of an empty root and explicit exit-1 setup proof; production setup and installed skill instructions remain forbidden.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the two staged-blob hashes plus aggregate before reviewing.
Review only whether the two-file repair is the smallest coherent authority correction for the observed live-smoke contradiction.
Check that it preserves non-authoring setup, keeps all-three assertions strong, and does not authorize production or installed-skill widening.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence and smallest in-scope remediation.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, handoff/ledger writes, or user task hops.
No review conclusion on the broader implementation subject.
No production setup/materializer, installed skill/template, definitions, schemas, Cargo, pipeline/stage, SDK, or HCM-2.2+ work.
tasks: Invoke the ordered required skills and return BLOCKED on any subject mismatch.
Verify the contradiction from live SPEC authority and current smoke/setup behavior.
Verify the repair is explicit, bounded, test-only, and sufficient to resume with an empty harness-owned root and setup exit-1 assertion.
Return CLEAN only with no Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if staged-blob fingerprint admission or authority cannot be reproduced.
Return CHANGES_REQUIRED instead of authorizing production setup or installed-skill changes.
